order.title: Place Your Order — Don't Wait! for Premium Wares
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Secret Access Code must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and a special character.
order.subscriptionRenewal: The subscription will automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until canceled.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews and is billed to the payment card you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the customer portal select the active service and click the Void the Agreement link or email at: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Place My Order below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have read the terms above and I agree.

changeTimezone.importantNote3: The timezone on this page will always default to America/New_York regardless of what your cargo unit is set to.

reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-installing the operating system will discard all data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-installing the operating system, please take a backup to the warehouse.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I want to re-install the Operating System!

resetPassword.title: Reset Premium Wares Secret Access Code
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows secret access code reset will result in an unclean shut down. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no updates are currently running. If an update is running VNC will show: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Shutting down in this state can result in an unbootable machine.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I want to Reset the Secret Access Code!

reverseDns.title: Reverse DNS
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse DNS take up to an hour to show up.
reverseDns.updateReverseDns: Update the Terms of Reverse DNS
reverseDns.pleaseWait: Just a moment, we're processing your order...
reverseDns.success: Done! Great doing business with you! {text}

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop is a quick and convenient way to connect to a virtual machine's desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Administrator secret access code must first be set on the Premium Wares before you can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set your initial secret access code.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows you to connect to the virtual machine's desktop. VNC can be run in the browser or as a stand-alone client. Your computer's network address must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your Network Address access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Just a moment — please wait 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You can also download one of the many VNC clients available on the internet. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your Premium Wares Network Address. Secret Access Code is not required after your remote network address has been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Setup VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Network Address to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Network Address

setupVnc.success: Done! Great doing business with you! {text}

restore.offlineNote: Your cargo unit will be offline while it replaces all your current files with those in the warehouse backup. Please contact the Customer Support Desk with any questions.
